name: NetSolP
description: Given a list of protein sequences, rapidly predict the Solubility and Usability. Uses an ensemble of finetuned ESM1b models.
capabilities: Given a list of protein sequences, rapidly predict the Solubility and Usability
Uses an ensemble of finetuned ESM1b models

sequences.description: One or more protein amino acid sequences in FASTA format for solubility and usability prediction
